ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the section or department that owns the task */,
  "task_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of task (e.g., maintenance, incident) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the task (e.g., storage, networking) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or description of the task */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the task (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "last_edited" TEXT /* Date the task was last edited */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress percentage of the task */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the task */,
  "parent_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent task for task dependencies */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_task_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_type_id") REFERENCES task_types ("task_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the section */,
  "parent_section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent section for hierarchical section structure */,
  "section_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_types" (
  "task_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task type */,
  "task_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the task type (e.g., maintenance, incident) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., storage, networking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that has a dependency */,
  "dependent_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that is depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., predecessor, successor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_dependent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that was changed */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_history_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that has the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., create task, edit task) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "knowledge_base" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the article belongs to */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_knowledge_base_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES article_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES knowledge_base ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the user was assigned to the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., image, pdf, docx) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_documents_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration (e.g., monitoring tool, helpdesk software) */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., API, webhook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the integration */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
